## Problem Statement

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? If so, describe it clearly and concisely. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Include API changes, new entrypoints, or modified behaviour. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered. -->

## Impact

- **Contracts affected:** <!-- Which crates would change? e.g. credence_bond, credence_treasury -->
- **Storage changes:** <!-- New/changed storage keys? -->
- **New error codes:** <!-- Will new ContractError variants be needed? See docs/error-codes-wire.md -->
- **Events:** <!-- Will new events be emitted? -->
- **Docs needed:** <!-- Which docs would need updating? -->

## Testing Considerations

<!-- How should this be tested? Include edge cases, property-based tests, or integration tests. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, references, or designs. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I have described the problem and proposed solution
- [ ] I have identified affected contracts and storage
